chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Before:- Mr. Justice Nadeem Akhtar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon CP No. D- 2995 of 2018 ( Muhammad Akram Khan V/s Province of Sindh and others) Date of hearing & decision: 10.12.2019 Mr. Roshan Ali Azeem Mallah advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON J, - The instant Constitution Petition, under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, has been filed by the Petitioner, seeking direction to revenue officers to issue Sale Certificate in respect of his plots. 2. Since the issue involved in this petition is akin as decided by this Court in CP. No. D- 2342 of 2019, therefore, this petition being not maintainable under Article 199 of the Constitution is dismissed accordingly leaving the petitioner to avail and exhaust the remedy, if any, as provided under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Karar_hussain/PS*
